projects.title: 2048 Game
projects.description: The classic 2048 puzzle with keyboard and swipe input, smooth tile transitions and best-score persistence.

projects.title: Age Calculator
projects.description: An elegant, comprehensive calculation interface that evaluates granular chronological profiles including exact days lived, total active stats, and live next-birthday countdown tracking.

projects.title: Blog
projects.description: A full-featured blog application built with React, Vite, Appwrite, Redux Toolkit, and TinyMCE. Supports authentication, post creation, editing, deletion, image uploads, protected routes, and dark mode.

projects.title: Book Library
projects.description: A premium, glassmorphic reading progress tracker and collections shelf manager using localStorage.

projects.title: Calendar And Scheduling App
projects.description: An interactive organizational grid application featuring real-time date compilation, localized monthly display matrices, categorized event registration streams, and dynamic chronological agenda views.

projects.title: Chat Room
projects.description: A real-time multi-tab chat room using BroadcastChannel API and localStorage — no server needed.

projects.title: Color Palette Generator
projects.description: Generate beautiful, harmonious color palettes using color theory. Choose from analogous, complementary, triadic, and more. Lock colors you love and regenerate the rest — copy hex codes instantly.

projects.title: Daily Wheels
projects.description: A weighted decision wheel for picking what to eat, watch or do today, with custom SVG graphics and category presets.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio Builder
projects.description: A modern developer portfolio builder with live preview, customizable sections, responsive templates, and export-ready portfolio pages.

projects.title: Dice Roller Simulator
projects.description: Simulate rolling one or multiple 3D dice with advanced physics, sound synthesis, history analytics, and themes.

projects.title: Digital Clock
projects.description: A sleek digital clock featuring live real-time updates through native JavaScript APIs, dynamic calendar views, and interactive 12/24 hour display formatting toggles.

projects.title: Ecommerce Store
projects.description: A premium e-commerce storefront with dynamic product catalog, multi-attribute filtering, sorting, glassmorphic cart drawer, step-based checkout with validation, and real-time card preview.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
projects.description: A premium Black & Gold daily expense tracker with interactive SVG analytics and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Fitness Progress Dashboard
projects.description: Visualize workouts, calories, weight trends, and activity summaries with interactive charts.

projects.title: Food Delivary App Ui
projects.description: An ultra-premium dark themed food exploration and delivery platform built using zero-dependency vanilla workflows, featuring real-time catalog search filters, food modifier drawers, and a live tracking progress simulator.

projects.title: GitHub User Search
projects.description: A premium search dashboard to fetch, display, and cache GitHub developer profiles and recent repositories.

projects.title: Habit Tracker
projects.description: habit-bloom is a beautiful habit-tracking web app that help users build consistency

projects.title: Hungama Game
projects.description: An ultra-premium browser-native word guessing application designed around the mechanics of traditional Hangman. This educational project implements comprehensive client-side string processing operations to track and map character vectors, dynamic real-time SVG path rendering to render scale attempts step-by-step on a vector canvas, a custom 7-column virtual keyboard grid, and local persistence arrays for game win streaks managed via browser LocalStorage parameters.

projects.title: Image Gallery
projects.description: A responsive image gallery with drag-and-drop upload, IndexedDB persistence, categorization, and lightbox navigation.

projects.title: Interview Preparation
projects.description: A complete interview preparation platform featuring HR and technical questions, notes management, study progress tracking, YouTube resource management, mock interview tools, and preparation analytics built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.title: Invoice Billing Generator
projects.description: A web app to create invoices, add line items, calculate totals, and export as PDF.

projects.title: Job Application Tracker
projects.description: Manage job applications, application statuses, interview dates, and notes using a Kanban-style interface.

projects.title: Linkedln Clone
projects.description: A polished LinkedIn desktop clone with interactive profile banner, edit modal, dynamic post feed with emoji/likes/comments, networking recommendation deck with connect simulation, print-ready resume view, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Markdown Editor
projects.description: Real-time Markdown editor with glass UI, export to HTML, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Memory Card Game
projects.description: A gamified memory match card game with 3D flip animations, leveling system, combo streaks, XP progression, multiple realms, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Movie Search App
projects.description: Search for movies using the OMDb API with a sleek dark glassmorphism UI and detailed modal view.

projects.title: Music Player
projects.description: iPhone-style audio player with iTunes Search API integration, album artwork, and 30-second preview playback.

projects.title: Netflix Clone
projects.description: A premium Netflix-inspired streaming UI with cinematic hero banner, dynamic multi-row content rails from static JSON, hover-scale cards with inline metadata, and a detailed movie modal — all vanilla JS.

projects.title: News Aggregator Interface
projects.description: Browse categorized news cards, trending topics, search, and bookmarking.

projects.title: Notes App
projects.description: A clean, keyboard-friendly notes app with live URL detection, tags and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Password Generator
projects.description: A sleek, lightweight web app to create secure, randomized passwords with adjustable length and toggleable character types — uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

projects.title: Pipe Connection Puzzle
projects.description: An immersive puzzle game where players rotate various grid pipe segments to link endpoints into a leak-free plumbing network. Built with native responsive designs and SVG animations.

projects.title: Pomodoro Timer
projects.description: A focus timer with task tracking, stats dashboard, customisable durations, sound alerts and light/dark theme.

projects.title: QR Code Generator
projects.description: Generate custom QR codes dynamically using links, plain text, or small configuration file payloads with custom color layouts.

projects.title: Quiz Master
projects.description: A premium Black & Orange MCQ Quiz App with local auth, score tracking, and an AI-mock topic generator.

projects.title: Random Quote Generator
projects.description: Displays a random motivational or famous quote on button click.

projects.title: Real Estate Listing
projects.description: A modern property browsing app with advanced filtering, gallery layouts, and a favorites list saved to local storage.

projects.title: Restaurant Ordering Interface
projects.description: An ultra-premium, zero-dependency restaurant menu browser and ordering interface designed around precise item option customizations, synchronized client cart processing metrics, and structural responsive constraints.

projects.title: Resume Builder Form
projects.description: A dynamic resume builder with real-time preview, dual templates (Classic Minimalist & Modern Professional), customizable accent colors, tag-based skills/languages, photo upload via File Reader API, and print-to-PDF support.

projects.title: Simon Says Game
projects.description: An arcade-accurate, high-fidelity browser implementation of the classic Simon Says sensory game loop. Engineered entirely through native client-side infrastructure scripts, the layout implements absolute quadrant grid segment shapes, dynamic glow modifier channels, custom pointer interaction guard blocks, persistent LocalStorage high score counters, and a synthesized live audio rendering track driven natively via the Web Audio API Oscillator engine.

projects.title: Subscription Management Dashboard
projects.description: A premium dark finance dashboard for tracking subscriptions with real-time monthly/annual spend, category distribution bars, renewal alerts, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Task Management Dashboard
projects.description: An ultra-premium, dependency-free developer workspace platform designed using native web semantics. The architecture incorporates a strict three-column dashboard layouts configuration tracking dynamic statistical counts filters, state modification streams, low/medium/high task urgency hierarchies, a chronological system transaction logger engine, and a structural client-side data persistence layer driven entirely via optimized browser LocalStorage allocations.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: A premium neon cyberpunk Tic Tac Toe game with Player vs Player and unbeatable AI (Minimax) modes, persistent scoreboard, and animated win detection.

projects.title: Travel Booking Dashboard
projects.description: An integrated multi-column travel management layout featuring dynamic flight and accommodation routing selectors, client-side filtering grids, and reactive price calculations.

projects.title: Typing Practice App
projects.description: An interactive, glassmorphic typing speedometer helping users scale their typing dexterity via custom timers, dynamic difficulty preset word banks, Web Audio synth haptic feedbacks, and real-time speed progress graphs.

projects.title: Typing Speed Tester
projects.description: Measure typing speed (WPM) and accuracy with a simple web app.

projects.title: Weather Finder
projects.description: Fetches live weather data from an API and shows temperature and conditions.

projects.title: Whack A Mole
projects.description: An arcade-style Whack-A-Mole game featuring Web Audio API retro sounds, satisfying particle effects, progressive speed levels, and high score persistence.

projects.title: YouTube Homepage Clone
projects.description: A responsive YouTube homepage clone featuring a modern layout, video grid, sidebar navigation, and adaptive design for different screen sizes.
